pages.text: The $(item)Large Nether Forest Skyseed$() — a $(item)Large Forest Skyseed$() centred in crimson stems + shroomlight. A vast fungal forest.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Stems and shroomlights from any $(item)Nether Forest$() isle.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A vast $(bold)fungal forest$() thick with huge fungi and Hoglins — crimson by default, $(bold)warped$() (teal, with Endermen) in a warped biome.
$(bold)Crafted$()$(br)A $(item)Large Forest Skyseed$() in the centre of a 3x3 of $(item)crimson stems$() and $(item)shroomlight$().
